scripts.build: npm run copy-assets && npm run build:hook && npm run build:panel && npm run build:popup
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/icons && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp public/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp public/icons/*.png dist/icons/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run build:hook -- --watch" "npm run build:panel -- --watch" "npm run build:popup -- --watch"
